utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided as two sub-items with plan names and monthly costs (€100 and €65). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided as a single string for photography equipment coverage with €60/month. It mentions property coverage and cost, though it focuses on equipment rather than home/contents; however, it still qualifies as property coverage with costs. Considered specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided as plan name and €50/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided as “Professional Liability Insurance (recommended, to be secured with a specialized provider)” but no cost is given. Not fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided only as €275/month; no annual breakdown. This is a partial breakdown, not complete. Not fully specified.
Therefore, 3 items are fully specified (health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage) out of 5 total.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Plan (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan (maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Photography Equipment) (maps to property_protection.home_content -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage), InsurePlus Standard Plan (Adventure Activities) for travel (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> InsurePlus Standard Plan). Professional Liability Insurance is a recommendation without a corresponding rated item, so it is excluded.
